display_name: Monetary Policy Transmission & Central Bank Strategy

knowledge_gaps: QT endgame scenarios and reserve scarcity thresholds

The LNG-EUR/USD channel structurally constrains ECB monetary policy space via ~$40-50B/year structural USD demand from Europe's shift to USD-denominated LNG, shifting TTF-EUR/USD correlation from r=-0.15 to r=-0.45
Interaction between QT and bank reserve management
The credit-equity basis (equity-implied spreads 20-40bp wider than actual credit spreads) signals credit market overoptimism with historical 2006-07 precedent
Dollar weaponization creates a parallel monetary transmission channel bypassing central banks via OFAC compliance burden and bank self-sanctioning
Gold at $3,000+ prices structural loss of monetary policy credibility rather than cyclical real-rate dynamics, with $400-600/oz residual above real-rate-implied levels
Transmission lags in current rate cycle vs historical
The Fed framework review (2025-2026) is mispriced event risk with ~50% non-event probability
China's monetary/fiscal policy mix is the single most important driver of base metals outcomes given 55% copper consumption share and rotation toward copper-intensive applications
focus.instruction: This topic has been studied at overview level. Focus on: (1) specific subtopics listed, (2) closing identified knowledge gaps, (3) cross-topic interactions with connected topics, (4) edge cases and regime-dependent behavior.
